event_comments:
Part of the Ultimate Orienteer Series, COC’s variety pack of orienteering events.
Orienteering in the dark! The 1st event in the 2018 Ultimate Series is Night-O at Hamlin Park in Shoreline. Get out your headlamps and join us for this fun event!
Check back later for special notes from the Course Designer(s).
